<!DOCTYPE html> <html lang="{{ str_replace('_', '-', app()->getLocale()) }}"> <head> <meta charset="utf-8"> <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1"> <title inertia>{{ config('app.name', 'Laravel') }}</title> <!-- Fonts --> <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.bunny.net"> <link href="https://fonts.bunny.net/css?family=figtree:400,500,600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" /> <!-- Scripts --> @routes @vite(['resources/js/app.js', "resources/js/Pages/{$page['component']}.vue"]) @inertiaHead </head> <body class="font-sans antialiased"> @inertia </body> </html>
